description: Use this API to remove a model from the list of known library models; library models are added to this list the first time that they are called. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr = dropmodelprogram(programname)

parameters.name: programname
parameters.description: Name of the model program. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
